transcript.text:
[It's ramyun noodles today!]
[But not your average ramyun]
[It's something that left her in terror]
It's so spicy!
[A very spicy hangover ramyun]
[Try the soup too~]
[Soup...?]
[Will she be able to finish this mukbang?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Shinchon today
There's a place known for their ramyun noodles
And it holds 50 years of tradition
50 years just with ramyun noodles?
Oh! School chairs
Ta-da It's over here
[Phedra] [Seoul, Seodaemun-gu]

Hello~!
[An interior you can feel its time and age]
Writings on the wall The place feels old in general
It has a 2nd floor
Excuse me, Are the noodles really spicy?
You can choose its spiciness
Oh is that so?
Yes you can
I'll try 3 levels
Non-spicy, regular, and spicy
It has other noodle dishes too
[Lots of different dishes on the menu]
1 ramyun with regular spiciness,
1 spicy ramyun,
1 jjapaguri (jjapaghetti+neoguri),
1 donkatsu (pork cutlet), And 1 Korean egg roll

[I'll make it right for you]
[Ramyun flavor with 50 years of tradition]
[A hangover ramyun noodle]
[A combination of Jjapaghetti and Neoguri]
[Jjapaguri]
[Korean-style egg roll]
[Donkatsu (pork cutlet)]
It has clams and mussels
Thank you
All here
This is the regular hangover ramyun
And this is the spicy one
Let's try the regular first
Ramyun noodles are always great
[This is regular?!?!]
That one is less spicy

This one is?
It's very spicy
Super spicy
It's delicious
It's not a bad feeling though It hits right away
Compare it with the one next to it
This one...?
Let's try the spicy one
[Am I trembling?]
Wait, I think I'm okay...
[Nevermind]
[That's the real deal]
But it's not a bad kind of spice on your tongue
It doesn't stack too much
A great stress reliever
Very spicy but tasty

The spicy one is better, right?
Yes, I like it more
They're both spicy
But this tastes better
It's hard to be more flavorful with this much spice But this tastes much better
[Jjapaguri this time]
1 bite of this
This should be 2 servings
Is this spicy too?
Not really
[She said the same thing about the ramyun noodles earlier]
Delicious
It's spicy
The spiciness is relieving stress
The coldness goes away from the body
I'm getting warm

1 bite of donkatsu
This is good too
Our donkatsu is made with chicken
It's chicken?
It's good!
Why was not able to tell it apart right away?
My tongue is numb right now
I usually know if it's chicken or pork
It's a good feeling though
A lot of times, the spiciness give more stress
This is the opposite
I can breathe now
My nose was clogged earlier
Chicken katsu as a palate cleanser
With egg rolls too
It looks so fluffy and soft

Really moist inside
These were meant to be eaten together
This is going to be great
This combo is yummy
The noodles are not bloated
Let's get some ramyun noodles before they get bloated
If it sits in the soup for too long, it gets spicier
I saved it
Tasty
Ramyun noodles made by mom is always yummy
It's like that
Chicken katsu is delicious
Your stomach won't pop?
No, I'll be fine
-You must be a good eater -Yes
A little better than others

Did you starve for a few days?
No way no way
I'm just a big eater
I knew I'd need this
Milk!
I have to calm my stomach down
[Came in prepared because she's not good with spicy food]
Time for round 2
I have the ramyun noodles in this bowl
The smell itself is so spicy
The spiciness kicks in
This is no joke
I feel good right now
3 would've been too spicy for me
I think 2 is a good amount I'm cutting down on eating too many spicy foods
Some egg rolls to neutralize the spiciness

They're not stuck together yet I love it
The jjapaguri is not spicy, but it has a kick to it
It's very savory
Delicious
The eggs are so good Everything is tasty
I want to drink the soup too because it's so good
But I'm scared
The soup is good too
[The soup is good too...?]
That's spicy
[Great job bringing some milk]
Yum
Let's try the spicy soup
[Alert!]
[An emergency transfusion]
It's very good though Full of flavor

Deep flavors
It's shockingly spicy as soon as you take a bite
A lot spicier than Fire Chicken Noodles (Buldak)
It's interesting that she doesn't gain weight
PD: She can eat 20 packs of regular ramyun noodles
[That's a headache...]
What in the world...
Is she even human?
Don't you get sick after that?
Sickness?
I'm okay I'm healthy
That's amazing
Thank you
I think your cooking skills are more amazing
You shouldn't eat any more today
I have to eat dinner in a bit

It was a very spicy yet yummy meal
I enjoyed it very much and got to relieve some stress
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
